contribution_description:

- Description: Updating Fatima as well spend time sourcing for the container box
  
  He ghosted on us. 
  
  Do find out the dimensions of the chocolate bars he produces for 50gram chocolate 
  
  Ask if he only has one mold or he has multiple different molds. If he has multiple molds could you get his help to check the dimensions of all of them
  
  We need to make sure the dimensions of the bars Kirsten produces with the molds we have over at her place are close to them a he has so as not to cause complications when they don’t fit
  
  Produced by Kirsten
  
  The package container is 
  
  6.5 inches: 16.51 cm
  3.2 inches: 8.128 cm
  
  This is what we are going to be using as suggested by Kirsten 
  
  https://a.co/d/05fy0La7
  
  Since she only can offer 2 days a month, there is an upper bound production limit to why she can help support in production. 100 bars per month 
  
  If we do land a large other, we are stuck
  
  The bars Santos produces needs to be able to fit into these envelopes
  
  https://a.co/d/06AeSnhR
